mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_product(user_id, company_no, product_no, inquiry_title, inquiry_contents, inquiry_ans, inquiry_date) VALUES(#{userId}, #{companyNo}, #{productNo}, #{inquiryTitle}, #{inquiryContents}, 0, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ip.inquiry_no, ip.user_id, ip.product_no, ip.inquiry_title, ip.inquiry_contents, ip.inquiry_date, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.img_url, p.original_price, p.deposit, c.company_no, c.com_name, c.com_intro, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry_product_answer WHERE inquiry_no = ip.inquiry_no) > 0, '1', '0') AS inquiry_ans FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN product p ON ip.product_no = p.product_no LEFT JOIN company c ON p.company_no = c.company_no WHERE c.company_no = ( SELECT c1.company_no FROM company c1 WHERE c1.user_id = #{userId} ) ORDER BY ip.inquiry_date DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO inquiry_product_answer(inquiry_no, answer_contents, ans_user_id, answer_date) VALUES(#{inquiryNo}, #{answerContents}, #{ansUserId}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT ip.inquiry_no, ip.inquiry_ans, ipa.answer_no, ipa.answer_contents, ipa.ans_user_id, /* 💡 관로 추가: 답변 일시 추출 */ ipa.answer_date FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN inquiry_product_answer ipa ON ip.inquiry_no = ipa.inquiry_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE inquiry_product_answer SET answer_contents = #{answerContents}, ans_user_id = #{ansUserId}, answer_date = NOW() WHERE inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
mapper.select: SELECT ip.inquiry_no, p.product_no, ip.inquiry_title, ip.inquiry_contents, IF((SELECT COUNT(*) FROM inquiry_product_answer WHERE inquiry_no = ip.inquiry_no) > 0, '1', '0') AS inquiry_ans, /* 💡 관로 추가: 나의 문의 내역 화면으로 보낼 등록일시 데이터 추출 */ ip.inquiry_date, p.product_name, p.product_details, p.original_price, p.is_active, p.img_url FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN product p ON ip.product_no = p.product_no WHERE ip.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY ip.inquiry_date DESC

SELECT ip.inquiry_no, c.user_id, ipa.answer_contents, /* 💡 관로 추가: 문의 상세보기 창으로 배달될 업체 답변 일시 데이터 추출 */ ipa.answer_date FROM inquiry_product ip LEFT JOIN company c ON ip.company_no = c.company_no LEFT JOIN inquiry_product_answer ipa ON ip.inquiry_no = ipa.inquiry_no WHERE ip.inquiry_no = #{inquiryNo}
